title: Add Advanced Templates with Design Variations and Multi-Theme Save Option

requirements.text: Expand the template library in `frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.ts` by adding at least 6 new distinct, modern, and advanced invitation templates. New templates must include diverse design styles such as: Floral Boho, Regal Emerald, Dusty Rose Romantic, Midnight Luxe, Rustic Parchment, and Pastel Garden. Each template must define unique font pairings, color palettes, gradient backgrounds, and decorative motifs (border patterns, overlay textures) that are visually distinct from each other and from the current 6 templates.

quotes: add more unique, modern, and advanced templates with better design variations

acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 new templates are added to templateDefinitions.ts with unique IDs, names, and full style configurations.
Each new template has a distinct color palette, font pairing, and gradient/background style not duplicated by another template.
All new templates render correctly in TemplateSelector, TemplatePreview, and TemplateThemeStep components.

requirements.text: Enhance the `TemplateSelector` component to group and display the expanded template library with improved visual previews. Each template card must show a richer simulated preview reflecting the template's unique color palette, fonts, and decorative style. Add a 'New' or 'Premium' badge label to the newly added templates. Group templates into meaningful categories (e.g., 'Royal Indian', 'Modern Minimal', 'Romantic', 'Dark Luxe', 'Boho & Floral', 'Vintage & Rustic').

quotes: better design variations and customization options

acceptanceCriteria: TemplateSelector displays all new and existing templates grouped by updated categories.
Each card shows a styled preview using the template's own colors and fonts.
New templates are visually distinguished with a badge.

requirements.text: Enhance the customization panel in `TemplateThemeStep` to provide more advanced per-template customization options: (1) a background style picker with at least 4 options (solid, gradient, pattern, texture), (2) an accent color intensity slider, (3) a border/frame style selector with at least 3 decorative frame options, and (4) a layout density toggle (compact / spacious). These options must update the live preview in real time.
acceptanceCriteria: Background style picker renders at least 4 options and the preview updates immediately on selection.
Accent color intensity slider is functional and visually reflected in the preview.
Border/frame style selector shows at least 3 options that affect the preview card's border.
Layout density toggle changes spacing in the live preview.

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko actor in `backend/main.mo` to support storing multiple theme variants per invitation. Add a `savedThemes` field (array of theme/template config records) to the invitation data type. Add backend functions: `saveThemeVariant(invitationId, themeConfig)` to append a theme variant, `getThemeVariants(invitationId)` to retrieve all saved variants, and `deleteThemeVariant(invitationId, themeIndex)` to remove a specific variant. The existing single `template` field must remain for the active/published theme.

quotes: an option to save it in multiple themes or just a single selected theme

acceptanceCriteria: Invitation record includes a `savedThemes` array field.
saveThemeVariant appends a new theme config and returns the updated list.
getThemeVariants returns all saved theme variants for a given invitation.
deleteThemeVariant removes the theme at the specified index.
Existing single-template field and all existing invitation CRUD operations continue to work unchanged.

requirements.text: In the invitation creation wizard (`CreateInvitationWizard.tsx`) and the `InvitationEditor.tsx`, add a 'Save Theme' section on the TemplateThemeStep. This section must include: (1) a 'Save as Single Theme' button that saves only the currently selected template/customization as the active theme, and (2) a 'Save as Theme Variant' button that adds the current configuration as an additional saved variant without replacing the active theme. Display all saved theme variants as small thumbnail cards below the template selector, with options to apply (set as active) or delete each variant.

quotes: an option to save it in multiple themes or just a single selected theme

acceptanceCriteria: 'Save as Single Theme' button saves the active template config and replaces any previously active theme.
'Save as Theme Variant' button appends the current config to the saved variants list without changing the active theme.
Saved theme variant thumbnails are displayed in a scrollable row below the template selector.
Each variant thumbnail has an 'Apply' button and a 'Delete' button.
Applying a variant sets it as the active template and updates the live preview.
Deleting a variant removes it from the list and calls the backend deleteThemeVariant function.

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` for the new backend theme variant operations: `useSaveThemeVariant`, `useGetThemeVariants`, and `useDeleteThemeVariant`, following the same patterns as existing mutation/query hooks in that file.
acceptanceCriteria: useSaveThemeVariant mutation hook calls the backend saveThemeVariant function and invalidates relevant queries on success.
useGetThemeVariants query hook fetches all theme variants for a given invitation ID.
useDeleteThemeVariant mutation hook calls deleteThemeVariant and invalidates relevant queries on success.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All existing invitation CRUD operations and the active single-template field must remain fully functional.
New templates must not duplicate existing template IDs or names.
nonGoals: Changing the overall multi-step wizard flow or step ordering.
Adding real-time collaboration or multi-user editing.
Implementing paid/subscription gating for premium templates.
Modifying the RSVP, photo gallery, or music upload features.
